title: DPI import with invalid return type compiles (to wrong output)

features.name: dpi_import_function_bit_vector_return_type_oversized
features.description: Code should include a DPI import function with a bit vector return type where the width exceeds 32 bits (e.g., bit [63:0])

features.name: dpi_import_function_bit_vector_return_type
features.description: Code should include a DPI import function with a bit vector return type (any width, violating the standard's scalar-only requirement)
